_about: Ready-to-use sample inputs for testing the KI-PV-Assistent backend. Each scenario has a ProjectContext (`context`), a `question`, a `lang` (de/en), and what it should demonstrate (`expect`). Paste a context into the UI or POST it to the API.

scenarios.description: Demo case: single-family home in Braunschweig, PV + 22 kW wallbox + heat pump (German).
scenarios.expect: Resolves NI + BS|Netz; valid: NBauO exempt, MaStR, smart meter (>7 kWp); 22 kW wallbox needs approval + §14a; announced: Aug-2026 degression; outdated: 70% rule.
scenarios.question: Welche Regeln, Pflichten und nächsten Schritte gelten für mein Vorhaben (PV, Wallbox, Wärmepumpe)?

scenarios.description: Same demo case in English (verifies bilingual answers).
scenarios.expect: Identical rules, English phrasing + English clarifying/assessment text.
scenarios.question: Which rules, obligations and next steps apply to my project (PV, wallbox, heat pump)?

scenarios.description: Small 5 kWp PV only — below the 7 kWp smart-meter threshold.
scenarios.expect: Smart-meter rule (msbg) NOT applicable; feed-in tariff + MaStR + NBauO still apply.
scenarios.question: Welche Regeln gelten für meine kleine PV-Anlage?

scenarios.expect: Assessment suitability 'limited', lower score/yield; note about non-south orientation.
scenarios.question: Is PV worthwhile on my roof?

scenarios.description: Existing PV, user wants to expand but gives no commissioning date.
scenarios.expect: Clarifying question asks for the existing_pv_commissioning date (the 'I ask you' behavior).
scenarios.question: Ich möchte meine bestehende PV-Anlage erweitern — was muss ich beachten?

scenarios.description: Different region (Stuttgart 70569) — different grid operator + state.
scenarios.expect: Resolves BW + Netze BW; NBauO (Niedersachsen) building-law rules do NOT apply; EEG/§14a/MaStR still apply.
scenarios.question: Welche Regeln gelten für meine PV-Anlage?

scenarios.description: A question the knowledge base does not cover (anti-hallucination check).
scenarios.expect: out_of_scope=true; answer recommends a specialist/installer instead of inventing facts.
scenarios.question: What garden insurance do I need for a trampoline?
